messages.content: I assume you can log the whole conversation? we are having and save it after tasks are complete?
Yes, I can log our conversation and save it. Here's what I can do...
I'll implement conversation logging as part of the Phase 0 logging system...
I'll continue with the logging system implementation...

can you run the logger on this conversation to populate the logs? Also can the logs and log relevant stuff be in he Logs folder. or does src need to be in root? I would prefer if Architect Logs were in logs/Architect and the src was inside Scripts with all of its scripts. Also how are we naming the logs?
I'll address all of these points. Let me first run the conversation logger to capture this conversation, then restructure the directory layout as you requested.
Yes, that's correct! c:\SovereignAI\Logs\Architect\Conversations is the proper location for conversation logs...

Ok based on our conversation so far is there any rules we should update. Do we want a Global Rule for project Architecture? Each Agent will have a Agents.md in Agents folder Rules in the rule folder, workflow in the workflow folder Scripts in the Scripts folder Logs in the logs folder. We want this always to be the case.
Excellent point! Based on our conversation, we should establish this as a global architectural rule...

context.task: Implement Phase 0 Logging Foundation and Global Architecture Rules
